ai.writePromptBeforeSaving: Write a prompt before saving a draft.
ai.managedOnTrainerMobile: Draft creation lives in trainer mobile workflows; owner web keeps the activity log.
ai.promptPlaceholder: Draft a retention note, renewal reminder, or staff follow-up.
ai.activityLogHelp: Saves to the same assistant activity log used by trainer workflows.

audit.draftReviewTrainerApp: Draft review happens in the Trainer app.

billing.billingProfileReadyBody: Receipts can use your saved business details.
billing.billingProfileMissingBody: Add legal name, billing email, phone, and address.
billing.gstInvoicesReadyBody: Tax invoices have the GST fields they need.
billing.gstInvoicesMissingBody: Add GST number and complete invoice fields.
billing.autopayMissingBody: Choose plan and complete the Razorpay mandate.
billing.referralCodeCopied: Referral code copied. Share it with another gym owner.
billing.couldNotCopyReferral: Could not copy. Select the code manually.
billing.billingDetailsSaved: Billing details saved. Receipts and tax invoices can now be generated.
billing.subscriptionCancelAfterPeriod: Subscription will cancel after this billing period.
billing.finishBillingSetupDescription: Complete these steps once so paid billing, receipts, and GST invoices work without desk follow-up later.
billing.billingDetailsDescription: Required for receipts and GST invoices.
billing.usageLimitsDescription: Check before changing package or diagnosing a limit warning.
billing.platformReferralDescription: Share this code with another gym owner. When they sign up using it, both gyms get an extended free trial.
billing.mandateActiveDescription: Your mandate is active. Update the plan only when limits or billing cycle change.
billing.autopaySetupDescription: Pick a plan and enable autopay once. First charge happens after the trial, so the gym keeps running without a desk follow-up.
billing.cancelAfterPeriodDescription: Your gym keeps access until this paid period ends, then Zook stops future subscription charges.
billing.invoicesDescription: Invoices start after the first paid billing cycle.
billing.noInvoicesDescription: Save billing details, GST fields, and autopay before the first paid billing cycle creates an invoice.

dashboard.emptyOrganization: No active gym is available yet.
dashboard.emptyOrganizationDescription: Your sign-in is active, but no gym is connected to this account yet. Owners can create a gym profile from here.
dashboard.branchScopeMeta: The app uses this branch for check-ins and plans.
dashboard.todayDescription: Check-ins, members, payments, stock, and follow-ups in one management view.
dashboard.sectionDescription: Open the tools for this gym workflow.
dashboard.needsAttentionDescription: Quick links for the work that usually needs action first.
dashboard.showingBranch: Showing data for the active branch
dashboard.trialBannerOne: Trial ends in {count} day. Add billing before launch to keep this gym active.
dashboard.trialBannerOther: Trial ends in {count} days. Add billing before launch to keep this gym active.
dashboard.setupDescription: Finish these basics so members can join, staff can operate, and the gym link is ready to share.
dashboard.completeGymProfileDetail: Publish your address, join mode, and gym profile page.
dashboard.missingBranchBlocker: Add a branch before members see accurate attendance and location details.
dashboard.missingCityBlocker: Add the gym city so public discovery and join pages feel complete.
dashboard.inactiveGymBlocker: Resolve gym status before sharing public membership links.
dashboard.createFirstPlanDetail: Members need at least one offer before they can join.
dashboard.createFirstPlanBlocker: Create at least one active membership plan before inviting members to join.
dashboard.inviteTeamDetail: Add trainers, reception, and admins before peak hours.
dashboard.inviteTeamBlocker: Invite one staff member so reception, coaching, and approvals are not owner-only.
dashboard.shareGymLinkDetail: Open the gym profile page and copy the join link or QR.
dashboard.shareGymLinkBlocker: Share the gym link or QR once profile and plans are ready.
dashboard.permissionRequired: This action requires Owner or Admin access.

overview.heroTitle: Run the gym, not the spreadsheet
overview.dailyCheckInsChartAria: Daily check-ins across the last 7 days
overview.finishBranchSubtitle: Choose a primary branch for inventory and attendance.
overview.confirmPaymentSubtitle: Run a small membership payment before inviting members.

members.workQueueTitle: Handle member exceptions before browsing the roster
members.noExceptions: No member exceptions need attention right now.
members.approveRequestsWaiting: New members are waiting before they can continue.
members.renewalsDueWaiting: Follow up before access reaches the edge.
members.renewalsDueEmpty: No memberships expire in the next 7 days.
members.missingContactWaiting: Receipts, renewal nudges, and desk callbacks need a reachable contact.
members.missingContactEmpty: Every member has at least one contact method.
members.pausedAccessWaiting: Review members who may be ready to resume.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search name, email, phone, member ID
members.noMembersMatchDescription: Try a different filter or search term.
members.noMembersDescription: Create your first membership plan and share your join link to start accepting members.
members.accessReactivated: Member can access the gym again.
members.chooseResumeDate: Choose a resume date before pausing.
members.membershipSwitched: Membership switched to the new plan.
members.importFailed: Import failed. Check the CSV format and try again.
members.bulkImportDescriptionOpen: CSV must include 'name' and 'email' columns. Optional: 'phone'.
members.bulkImportDescriptionClosed: Add many members from a CSV when you are setting up or migrating a roster.
members.importStepPlanAvailable: Assign a plan now or import members only
members.importStepPlanMissing: Create a plan later to activate memberships
members.importStepNotificationsOff: Notifications are off for this import
members.noPlanMembersOnly: No plan - add as members only
members.completeContactDetailsDetail: Renewal nudges, receipts, and desk callbacks need at least one reliable contact method.
members.pausedCannotCheckIn: This member cannot check in until the paused membership resumes.
members.noActiveMembershipReady: No active membership is ready for attendance or renewal work.
members.membershipEndsInDays: Membership ends in {days} days. Confirm renewal before access lapses.
members.lastCheckInDaysAgo: Last check-in was {days} days ago. A trainer or desk follow-up may help.
members.memberRecordReadyDetail: Contact, membership, and recent activity look ready for daily operations.
members.pauseDateHelp: Pause keeps the membership inactive until the selected resume date.
members.switchMembershipPlanDescription: This changes the active membership immediately to {plan} ({price}).
members.choosePlanBeforeSwitch: Choose a plan before switching this membership.
members.pauseMembershipDescription: Pause this membership until {date}. Check-ins stay inactive until the selected resume date.
members.chooseResumeBeforePause: Choose a resume date before pausing this membership.
members.resumeMembershipDescription: Resume this paused membership now and re-enable member access immediately.
members.memberMobileManaged: Members log workouts, body, and habits in the mobile app.
members.noIntakeNote: No intake note. Consider WhatsApp-ing the member before approving.
members.approveMembershipRequestDescription: Approve {plan} so the member can continue to payment.
members.rejectMembershipRequestDescription: Rejecting sends the member back to the request step. They need to apply again to continue.
members.queueClearDescription: Open-join and reviewed memberships stay out of this queue.
members.bodyCompositionEmptyDescription: Add body progress and progress photos from the member app.

payments.permissionOwnerAdmin: This action requires Owner or Admin access.
payments.bulkSettleReason: Bulk settled from owner payment queue after desk verification.
payments.amountGreaterThanZero: Enter an amount greater than Rs. 0.
payments.paymentMissingGym: This payment is missing its gym link.
payments.refundReasonRequired: Add a refund reason before submitting.
payments.refundAmountRange: Enter an amount between Rs. 1 and Rs. {amount}.
payments.refundSubmittedTracker: Refund submitted and added to the tracker.
payments.refundProviderReferenceMissing: This payment cannot be refunded automatically because it was not collected through Razorpay.
payments.refundDraftDescription: Confirming sends an irreversible refund request when this payment supports automatic refunds.
payments.refundDescription: This will submit a refund for {target}. Refund requests cannot be undone from the dashboard.
payments.refundsDescription: Start refunds for recent successful payments and track refunded payments.
payments.refundIrreversibleDescription: This will refund {amount} to {name}. Razorpay refunds are irreversible.
payments.noRefundablePayments: No successful payments are available for refund in this branch or payment view.
payments.closeCashCopy: {amount} desk-collected amount should match cash/UPI/card slips.
payments.addReceiptDetailsCopy: Offline payments should include a reference or uploaded receipt before owner review.
payments.refundWatchCopy: Use the refunds tab for partial or failed-payment corrections.
payments.offlinePaymentDescription: Cash, UPI, card, or bank transfer membership payments.
payments.paymentModeHelp: UPI is a direct bank transfer via PhonePe or GPay. Cash and Card are recorded for reconciliation. Bank Transfer may settle in one to two days.
payments.enterCollectedAmount: Enter the collected amount in rupees.
payments.manualPaymentAudit: Manual/offline payments are recorded with audit logs. Membership activation still follows the server confirmation rules for the selected payment path.
payments.deskPickupManaged: Pickup is completed in Desk after identity verification.
payments.settleDescription: Each order is marked as fulfilled without a pickup code. This action is logged.
payments.recordedQueueNote: Recorded from the owner payment queue.
payments.renewalWindowMeta: Members expiring in the next 7 days
payments.planLadderMeta: Useful while talking renewals at the desk

staff.inviteDescription: Invite email sends a sign-in link. Reception users should be tied to one branch; admins and trainers can work across assigned gym areas.
staff.addBranchBeforeReception: Add a branch before reception staff
staff.receptionBranchDescription: Reception access is tied to a location so check-ins, pickups, and entry approvals route to the right desk.
staff.revokeStaffDescription: This removes the staff member from this gym. Their historical activity stays in the audit log.
staff.capRecordPayments: Record cash, UPI, card, and bank payments
staff.capManageBranchesStaff: Manage branches and staff except billing
staff.archiveCoachingPlanDescription: Assigned plans are archived so member history remains intact.
staff.deleteCoachingPlanDescription: This plan will be removed from the training library.

reports.lowStockTip: {count} low-stock items need a shop check.
reports.stockClearTip: Shop stock is clear for the selected range.
reports.noRenewalTip: No urgent renewal window is visible.
reports.endDateAfterStartDate: End date must be after start date.
reports.attendanceInsightsCopy: QR entry points at reception are processing checks smoothly. Active check-ins peak during late evening and early morning hours.
reports.demandFunnelCopy: Public registration links are generating active join requests. Review pending inquiries under the member tab.

settings.billingPlanAutopayDescription: Add billing details, choose Starter/Growth/Pro, complete the Razorpay mandate, and view invoices.
settings.gymProfileDescription: Edit gym name, public username, contact details, join mode, photos, app links, and QR pages.
settings.branchesLocationsDescription: Add a branch, paste its Google Maps link, assign managers, set hours, and choose the main branch.
settings.staffPermissionsDescription: Invite admins, receptionists, and trainers with the right branch access.
settings.attendanceControlsDescription: Open QR attendance, approval queues, and branch-level check-in review.
settings.messagesTemplatesDescription: Prepare reusable templates and send member updates to selected audiences.
settings.pushDevicesDescription: Review registered push devices, revoke stale tokens, and prepare browser push registration.
settings.activityAuditTrailDescription: Review sensitive changes, actor history, and assistant drafts needing review.
settings.ownerControlsDescription: Daily operations, profile, team, and audit.
settings.integrationsDescription: Service status is managed centrally; billing and messaging links are available above.

notifications.deliveryDescription: Operational messages should stay crisp, permission-safe, and relevant.
notifications.deliveryHelp: Some messages may wait because of daily limits. Open History to resend manually.

trainers.performanceDescription: Review assigned clients, upcoming class load, and this-month payout totals.

payouts.monthlyPayoutDescription: Choose a trainer, set the formula, then close generated payouts below.
payouts.perSessionHelp: Leave per-session blank if the trainer does not earn a fixed fee per session.
payouts.noPayoutsDescription: Save a trainer payout config or record PT activity to generate monthly payouts.
payouts.enterValidAmounts: Enter valid payout amounts before saving.
payouts.markPaidDescription: This records {amount} as paid and cannot be undone from the dashboard.

classes.chooseBranchBeforeSchedulingClass: Choose one branch before scheduling a class.
classes.buildFirstClass: Build the first class for this branch
classes.nextClassDescription: {time} with {trainer}. Check roster, room setup, and payment status before members arrive.
classes.buildFirstClassDescription: Choose a trainer, capacity, time, and price so members can book from their app.
classes.pickBranchBeforeCreating: Pick one branch from the header before creating a class. The schedule stays with that branch.
classes.addTrainerInStaff: Add at least one trainer in Staff before scheduling classes.
classes.notesPlaceholder: Focus, equipment, or who the class is for.
classes.noClassesScheduled: No classes scheduled. Use the form on this page to add the first session for this branch.
classes.cancelThisClassDescription: Cancel this class? Enrolments will stop and the card will show as cancelled.

attendance.manualCheckInDescription: Record an entry for a member who can't scan the QR (lost phone, expired token, etc).
attendance.searchMemberPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
attendance.selectMemberToCheckIn: Select a member to check in.
attendance.manualReasonRequired: Add a reason for the manual override (at least 2 characters).
attendance.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Member's phone is dead, verified ID at desk
attendance.notesPlaceholder: Any extra context for this override
attendance.qrCodeEntryDescription: Members scan the gym QR, receive a unique entry code, and present it at the floor or desk.
attendance.branchQrMeta: Branch for QR and member attendance
attendance.setupBranchMeta: Set up your branch to start accepting members

plans.editMembershipPlanHelp: Pricing and visibility update after save.
plans.deleteMembershipPlanDescription: Only plans without subscriptions can be deleted. Archive plans with subscriptions so member history stays intact.
plans.newMembershipPlanHelp: Controls join, sales, and approval flows.
plans.planNameHelp: Use 60 characters or fewer and avoid raw numeric IDs.
plans.shapeHybrid: Days or visits, whichever comes first.
plans.shapeHint: Plan shape controls expiry, visits, and public join copy.
plans.descriptionPlaceholder: Best for regular members who want a monthly routine.
plans.couponsDetail: Create joining discounts and usage limits.
plans.offersDetail: Publish plan offers for a date window or campaign.
plans.referralsDetail: Reward member, trainer, and staff referrals.
plans.trainerPlansManaged: Plans are created and published by trainers in the Trainer app.
plans.couponsDescription: Create codes, set limits, and pause discounts without changing membership plans.
plans.offersDescription: Publish gym offers for a plan, date window, or gym-wide promotion.
plans.referralsDescription: Create member, staff, and trainer referral codes with clear monthly limits.
plans.referralEmpty: Referral performance starts after the first share.
plans.policyDescription: Set the reward, friend discount, and monthly cap.
plans.discountHelp: For percentage discounts, enter the visible percent value. For fixed discounts, enter rupees.
plans.noCouponsDescription: Create a code above to offer a controlled joining discount.
plans.referralCodeHelp: Share a code or checkout link with a member. The referred member applies it during plan checkout; rewards are applied only after a successful redemption.

settings.billingPlanAutopayDescription: Add billing details, choose Starter/Growth/Pro, complete the Razorpay mandate, and view invoices.
settings.gymProfileDescription: Edit gym name, public username, contact details, join mode, photos, app links, and QR pages.
settings.branchesLocationsDescription: Add a branch, paste its Google Maps link, assign managers, set hours, and choose the main branch.
settings.staffPermissionsDescription: Invite admins, receptionists, and trainers with the right branch access.
settings.attendanceControlsDescription: Open QR attendance, approval queues, and branch-level check-in review.
settings.messagesTemplatesDescription: Prepare reusable templates and send member updates to selected audiences.
settings.pushDevicesDescription: Review registered push devices, revoke stale tokens, and prepare browser push registration.
settings.activityAuditTrailDescription: Review sensitive changes, actor history, and assistant drafts needing review.
settings.ownerControlsDescription: Daily operations, profile, team, and audit.
settings.integrationsDescription: Service status is managed centrally; billing and messaging links are available above.

branchManagement.subscriptionScopeTitle: Choose a gym account, then add its branches.
branchManagement.subscriptionScopeBody: Use the gym selector in the header to move between gyms you own or operate. Branches are locations under the selected gym, not separate Zook subscriptions. Members can keep one active membership across branches that share the gym catalog.
branchManagement.scopeSubscription: One Zook subscription across owned gyms
branchManagement.scopeMaps: Branch maps show on app and web
branchManagement.opsContactBody: Optional details for daily operations. Add them when this branch is ready for staff handoff.
branchManagement.mapBody: Paste a Google Maps share link or open Maps from the saved address. This is the member-facing pin used on mobile, the public gym page, and Directions links.
branchManagement.googleMapsDesktopHint: Owners can paste a Maps link copied from desktop or mobile. If coordinates are found, Zook saves the precise pin automatically.
branchManagement.mapsLinkPublishHint: Maps link saved. Members will see this branch in Directions on mobile and web.
branchManagement.mapFallbackHint: Zook will still show map directions from the saved address if a precise pin is omitted.
branchManagement.plansProductsHelp: Shared uses the gym plans and products. Custom lets this branch use its own pricing and product list before members are attached.
branchManagement.sharedCatalogDescription: Members keep one active subscription across every branch that shares the gym catalog.
branchManagement.customCatalogDescription: Use only when this branch needs separate pricing or products before launch.
branchManagement.closedOnPublicPage: This branch is closed on the public page.
branchManagement.noBranchesDescription: Add the first location for branch-level attendance and stock controls.
branchManagement.addMapToPublish: Add map to show on app and web
branchManagement.makePrimaryDescription: New attendance and QR flows move to this location. Existing data stays intact.
branchManagement.deactivateDescription: Existing attendance, payments, and history stay intact. Members and staff stop using this branch.

shop.chooseBranchToEditStock: Choose a branch to edit stock
shop.finishOrdersBeforeStock: Finish payment or pickup before changing stock.
shop.pickupFulfillmentDescription: Collect pending payments and hand over ready pickups.
shop.pickupManagedInDesk: Pickup orders are handed over in Desk after identity verification.
shop.noShopOrders: No shop orders recorded for this gym.
shop.lineItemCount: {count, plural, one {# line item} other {# line items}}
shop.allProductsListedBranchStock: All products are listed. Choose a branch to update branch stock.
shop.stockThresholdsHelp: Low-stock alerts fire below the threshold. Out-of-stock products are hidden from the member shop.
shop.productPhotoGuidance: Product photos should be clear and square or slightly wide.
shop.deleteProductDescription: Only products without order history can be deleted. Restore products with history so reports stay consistent.
shop.editProductDescription: Changes save to {branch}. Use stock adjustment for audit history.
shop.productPhotosHelp: Add up to 6 clear photos. The first photo appears first in the shop.

auditNotes.radioCardGroup: Visible to dashboard operators; permission follows the host form; no audit log.
auditNotes.helpHint: Visible beside dashboard fields and cards; permission follows the host view; no audit log.
auditNotes.managedOn: Visible on read-only operational blocks; permission follows the host view; no audit log.
auditNotes.searchableSelect: Visible on branch, member, plan, and role pickers; permission follows the host form; no audit log.
